full_text:
Wang Zhong 王忠
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Zhong (王忠)was born in Youfufeng. Failed against Liu Bei. Once forced to eat human flesh, Cao Pi made a joke of it. Wang Zhong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
